channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 71/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 71/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 61.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Burnham allies accuse Streeting of sabotage over call for UK to rejoin EU
item.description: Politics latest: Burnham allies accuse Streeting of sabotage over call for UK to rejoin EU

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: Lots of talk of Streeting and Burnham being at war over Europe but their statements were actually very similar. Streeting: "one day back in the European Union. Burham: "In the long term there is a case for [rejoining...
item.description: Lots of talk of Streeting and Burnham being at war over Europe but their statements were actually very similar. Streeting: "one day back in the European Union. Burham: "In the long term there is a case for [rejoining...
